item.title: NLC India Ltd. Hits All-Time High of Rs 327.70 as Momentum Builds Across Timeframes
item.description: NLC India Ltd., a key player in the power sector, has reached an all-time high stock price on 29 April 2026, reflecting a remarkable phase of sustained growth and strong market performance. This milestone underscores the company’s resilience and steady progress amid a competitive industry landscape. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Vedanta Ltd. Surges 3.33% to Day's High of Rs 762.9 — Outperforms Sector by 2.75 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex climbed 1.33% on 29 Apr 2026, yet Vedanta Ltd. outpaced the broader market with a 3.33% gain, reaching an intraday high of Rs 762.9. This 2.75 percentage-point outperformance over its Non - Ferrous Metals sector peers highlights a distinctly stock-specific strength in a broadly positive market environment. Time: 6 minutes ago

item.title: Granules India Ltd Hits All-Time High of Rs 723 as Momentum Builds Across Timeframes
item.description: Granules India Ltd, a prominent player in the Pharmaceuticals & Biotechnology sector, achieved a landmark by reaching its all-time high stock price of Rs.723 on 29 April 2026. This milestone reflects the company’s sustained performance and robust market presence, underscored by a series of positive financial and technical indicators. Time: 27 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts SG Finserve Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 576.75
item.description: With a decisive surge to Rs 576.75 on 29 Apr 2026, SG Finserve Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, marking a 44.09% gain over the past year and significantly outperforming the Sensex, which declined by 2.88% during the same period. This milestone reflects a strong alignment of technical indicators and sustained price momentum that has propelled the stock well above its key moving averages. Time: 27 minutes ago

item.title: RBL Bank Ltd Surges 7.08% to Day's High of Rs 343.9 — Outperforms Sector by 6.14 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 1.35% on 29 Apr 2026, yet RBL Bank Ltd outpaced the broader market with a 7.08% gain, touching an intraday high of Rs 343.9. This 6.14-percentage-point outperformance over its Private Sector Bank peers signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a mere market tailwind. Time: 36 minutes ago

item.title: Unichem Laboratories Ltd Surges 8.28% to Day's High of Rs 401.45 — Outperforms Sector by 5.43 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 1.35% on 29 Apr 2026, yet Unichem Laboratories Ltd outpaced the broader market with an 8.28% gain, touching an intraday high of Rs 401.45. This 5.43-percentage-point outperformance over the Pharmaceuticals & Biotechnology sector signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 36 minutes ago

item.title: Swiggy Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amidst Weak Price Performance
item.description: Swiggy Ltd, a prominent player in the E-Retail and E-Commerce sector, has witnessed a notable 11.3% surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity despite the stock’s ongoing downward trajectory. This development, coupled with volume patterns and price action, offers critical insights into evolving market positioning and potential directional bets among investors. Time: 37 minutes ago

item.title: KFin Technologies Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: KFin Technologies Ltd (KFINTECH), a small-cap player in the capital markets sector, has witnessed a significant 17.3% surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite this, the company’s Mojo Grade was downgraded from Hold to Sell on 1 September 2025, reflecting cautious sentiment amid mixed technical and volume indicators. Time: 37 minutes ago

item.title: Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bullish Derivatives Activity
item.description: Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders Ltd (MAZDOCK) has witnessed a significant surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and potential directional bets. The large-cap aerospace and defence company outperformed its sector peers with a 3.52% gain on 29 Apr 2026, supported by robust volume and a notable increase in futures and options participation. Time: 37 minutes ago

item.title: Hitachi Energy India Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Signalling Strong Market Positioning
item.description: Hitachi Energy India Ltd (POWERINDIA) has witnessed a remarkable surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and potential directional bets. The stock recently hit a new 52-week and all-time high of ₹33,285, supported by strong volume and positive price momentum, reflecting growing investor confidence in the heavy electrical equipment sector. Time: 37 minutes ago

item.title: Bharat Dynamics Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Bharat Dynamics Ltd (BDL), a mid-cap player in the Aerospace & Defense sector, has witnessed a significant 19.18% surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite a modest 0.47% gain in the stock price, the underlying dynamics suggest a complex interplay of directional bets and liquidity considerations that merit close attention from investors and analysts alike. Time: 37 minutes ago

item.title: Cochin Shipyard Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Sustained Price Gains
item.description: Cochin Shipyard Ltd (COCHINSHIP) has witnessed a significant surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. The stock has outperformed its sector and broader indices, supported by robust volume and sustained buying interest over the past week. Time: 37 minutes ago

item.title: Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bullish Momentum
item.description: Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals Ltd (CROMPTON) has witnessed a significant surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. The stock has outperformed its sector peers, supported by robust volume and rising delivery participation, suggesting a potential directional bias emerging among traders. Time: 37 minutes ago

item.title: Bharat Forge Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Strong Market Momentum
item.description: Bharat Forge Ltd., a prominent player in the Auto Components & Equipments sector, witnessed a notable surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment on 29 Apr 2026. The stock hit a new 52-week and all-time high of Rs 1,949.9, supported by robust volume and positive market positioning, signalling increased bullish bets among traders and investors. Time: 37 minutes ago

item.title: Godfrey Phillips India Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bullish Derivatives Activity
item.description: Godfrey Phillips India Ltd. (GODFRYPHLP) has witnessed a significant surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and potential directional bets. The stock has outperformed its sector and broader indices, supported by rising volumes and a notable increase in futures and options participation, reflecting evolving investor positioning in this mid-cap FMCG player. Time: 37 minutes ago

item.title: Uno Minda Ltd Sees Significant Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Uno Minda Ltd, a mid-cap player in the Auto Components & Equipments sector, has witnessed a notable 13.08% increase in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and evolving investor positioning. This surge accompanies a modest 1.03% rise in the stock price, outperforming its sector peers and reflecting a complex interplay of bullish and cautious sentiments among traders. Time: 37 minutes ago

item.title: Motilal Oswal Financial Services Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Motilal Oswal Financial Services Ltd (MOTILALOFS) has witnessed a significant 28.14% surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite a modest 1.09% day gain, the stock underperformed its sector by 0.25%, reflecting a complex interplay between bullish bets and cautious sentiment among traders. Time: 37 minutes ago

item.title: Tata Steel Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Signalling Increased Market Positioning
item.description: Tata Steel Ltd has witnessed a remarkable surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, with OI more than doubling to 1,03,973 contracts from 51,255, marking a 102.85% increase. This sudden spike, coupled with robust volume and rising investor participation, suggests a significant shift in market positioning and potential directional bets on the ferrous metals giant. Time: 37 minutes ago

item.title: Indian Bank Sees Sharp Surge in Derivatives Open Interest Amid Bullish Momentum
item.description: Indian Bank (INDIANB) has witnessed a significant surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and potential directional bets. The stock outperformed its sector peers on 29 Apr 2026, supported by robust volume and positive price action, prompting a reassessment of its near-term outlook by investors and analysts alike. Time: 37 minutes ago

item.title: Oracle Financial Services Software Ltd Sees Significant Open Interest Surge Amid Bullish Momentum
item.description: Oracle Financial Services Software Ltd (OFSS) has witnessed a notable surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling increased market participation and potential directional bets. The stock’s recent price action, combined with rising volumes and improving technical indicators, suggests a bullish sentiment among traders and investors alike. Time: 37 minutes ago
